title: Forge Compliance Tier
description: Graded EU compliance dimension per docs/ARCHITECTURE-TARGET.md §10. Three tiers map to escalating sovereignty constraints. Used as the value of `compliance_tier` in archetype scaffold-manifest.yaml and per-change .forge.yaml when an archetype is compliance-tier-aware (e.g. identity.yaml standard's compliance_tier_aware: true flag).

x-tier-descriptions.T1: RGPD-compliant via DPA — SaaS hors EU acceptable si DPA + SCC + protections complémentaires (chiffrement, BYOK), assume risque résiduel CLOUD Act.
x-tier-descriptions.T2: Self-hostable — déployable sur n'importe quel K8s EU, contrôle technique mais pas qualification sovereign.
x-tier-descriptions.T3: Hébergement EU strict — SecNumCloud / HDS / EUCS High, 100% EU jurisdiction, immune CLOUD Act.
